structure.description: Detail derived-entity (AIBlock) —А–µ–љ–і–µ—А–Є—В —В—А–Є —З–∞—Б—В–Є: source-pane (—З—В–Њ –≤—Е–Њ–і–Є—В вАФ ref –љ–∞ upstream ќ¶), prompt/transform-pane (–Ї–∞–Ї —В—А–∞–љ—Б—Д–Њ—А–Љ–Є—А—Г–µ—В), result-pane (–њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ–і–љ–Є–є output + lastRunAt + manual-rerun CTA); autoUpdate-toggle –њ–µ—А–µ–Ї–ї—О—З–∞–µ—В –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г 'recompute on source change' –Є 'snapshot frozen'.

rationale.hypothesis: Reactive derivations (AI, formula-cell, materialized view) –Є–Љ–µ—О—В —Б–µ–Љ–∞–љ—В–Є–Ї—Г –Є—Б—В–Њ—З–љ–Є–ЇвЖТ—В—А–∞–љ—Б—Д–Њ—А–Љ–∞—Ж–Є—ПвЖТ—А–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В; –≤–Є–Ј—Г–∞–ї–Є–Ј–∞—Ж–Є—П '—З—В–Њ –±—Л–ї–Њ –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Њ / –Ї–∞–Ї / —З—В–Њ –≤—Л—И–ї–Њ' –≤–Њ—Б—Б—В–∞–љ–∞–≤–ї–Є–≤–∞–µ—В auditable lineage –≤ UI –Є —Б–љ–Є–Љ–∞–µ—В —З—С—А–љ—Л–є —П—Й–Є–Ї AI-–≤—Л–≤–Њ–і–∞; toggle auto vs manual —А–µ—И–∞–µ—В trade-off –Љ–µ–ґ–і—Г —Б–≤–µ–ґ–µ—Б—В—М—О –Є —Б—В–∞–±–Є–ї—М–љ–Њ—Б—В—М—О snapshot'–∞.

evidence.description: AI block —Б source citation + 'rerun' + 'auto-update on row change' toggle
AI summary block —Б source-ref + manual refresh
Reactive cell —Б input dependencies + cached output + recompute
Persistent derived tables вАФ source query + materialization timestamp + manual rebuild

shouldMatch.reason: AIBlock.{sourceRef, prompt, lastResult, autoUpdate, lastRunAt} + ai_rerun вАФ –≤—Б–µ compoenents –њ–∞—В—В–µ—А–љ–∞

shouldNotMatch.reason: Message вАФ terminal data, –љ–µ—В derivation lineage
